summary: P5 Runtime Cockpit, Notifications & Quarantine Testing Complete. All 73 backend tests pass (26 P5 + 47 P4). All 9 API endpoints verified working. Frontend Runtime Cockpit page renders correctly with all 7 sections.
critical_code_review_comments: All 73 pytest tests pass: 26 P5 cockpit/notifications + 47 P4 runtime enforcement
Cockpit API returns all 6 sections: health, flow, reliability, drift_heal, hard_fail, quarantine
Notification event config has 10 event types including tenant_became_ready and tenant_fell_out_of_ready
Quarantine check-release correctly validates mapping before release (returns safe_to_release=false for nonexistent room)
Frontend RuntimeCockpitPage correctly displays all sections with proper data-testids
seed_data_creation: None - unit tests use mocking for DB calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: P5 Runtime Cockpit, Notifications & Quarantine complete. 73 tests pass. New features: (1) Notification Events with severity model (INFO/WARNING/CRITICAL/BLOCKER) and cooldown/deduplication, (2) Runtime Cockpit unified dashboard at /runtime-cockpit showing health, flow, reliability, drift_heal, hard_fail, quarantine, (3) Quarantine visibility with classification breakdown, age buckets, and safe release guard. Login uses data-testid='hotel-login-email'. Auth token key is 'access_token'.

test_classes: TestNotificationEventConfig (6 tests) - severity model, cooldown values, state change flags
TestNotificationEventsDB (9 tests) - emit event, cooldown suppression, state dedup, history, summary
TestQuarantineService (10 tests) - classification, age buckets, safe release validation
TestAllAPIs (1 test) - all 13 API assertions in single httpx session

API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/runtime/cockpit: PASS - returns all 6 sections (health, flow, reliability, drift_heal, hard_fail, quarantine)
API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/notifications/events: PASS - returns events list with severity/timestamps
API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/runtime/quarantine/ove: PASS - returns total_quarantined, by_classification, by_age_bucket, by_provider
API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).POST /api/lockdown/runtime/quarantine/ch: PASS - validates mapping (safe_to_release=false for NONEXISTENT room)
API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).POST /api/lockdown/runtime/quarantine/sa: PASS - blocks release when guard check fails

sections_verified: Health Summary (5 cards: Status, Incidents, Quarantine, Verify%, Push Loop)
Flow Metrics (Queued, Coalesced, Emitted, Dropped, Hard Fail Blocked, Cycles) + Push Loop Controls
Reliability (Verify Success Ratio, Verify OK/FAIL, Dead Letters, Cycle Duration, Ack Latency)
Drift & Auto-Heal (Active Drifts, Auto-Healed Total, Failed, Eligible, Healed 24h, Manual Required)
Quarantine (Total, Classification breakdown, Age buckets, Provider breakdown)
Recent Events (Severity counts: INFO/WARNING/CRITICAL/BLOCKER, Event list)
Hard Fail Gate (Active Blocks, Open Incidents, Blocks 24h)

mocked_api_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All unit tests use proper mocking for DB calls, API tests hit real backend
